name: Nested Subquery
after_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM MEMBERS m
         JOIN ORDERS o ON m.id = o.member_id
         JOIN PAYMENTS p ON o.id = p.order_id
         WHERE p.amount > 100000

name: Nested Subquery
after_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.* FROM ORDERS o
         JOIN ORDER_ITEMS oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
         JOIN PRODUCTS p ON oi.product_id = p.id
         WHERE p.category_id = 2

name: Nested Subquery
after_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.* FROM ORDERS o
         JOIN MEMBERS m ON o.member_id = m.id
         JOIN COUPONS c ON m.id = c.member_id
         WHERE c.discount_amount > 0

name: CONNECT BY Hierarchy
after_sql:
WITH RECURSIVE cat_cte AS (
         SELECT id, parent_id, name FROM CATEGORIES WHERE parent_id IS NULL
         UNION ALL
         SELECT c.id, c.parent_id, c.name FROM CATEGORIES c JOIN cat_cte p ON c.parent_id = p.id
     ) SELECT * FROM cat_cte

name: START WITH Hierarchy
after_sql:
WITH RECURSIVE cat_cte AS (
         SELECT id, parent_id, name FROM CATEGORIES WHERE parent_id IS NULL
         UNION ALL
         SELECT c.id, c.parent_id, c.name FROM CATEGORIES c JOIN cat_cte p ON c.parent_id = p.id
     ) SELECT * FROM cat_cte
